policy.authored: Edit directly and review as Espframe source.
policy.generated: Edit the listed sources and regenerate; never hand-edit outputs.
policy.vendored: Update only from the recorded upstream revision and retain its license plus local-change notes.
policy.external_build_asset: Fetched only while building and must have a recorded upstream and license.

vendored.name: GSL3680 ESPHome touchscreen component
vendored.license: GPL-3.0-or-later for C/C++ and MIT for Python
vendored.local_changes: ESPHome API compatibility, boot timing, watchdog feeding, touch-count clamping, and device firmware table.

vendored.name: libjpeg-turbo ESP32 decode subset
vendored.local_changes: Trimmed ESP32 decoder build, RGB565 support, generated configuration, and architecture wrappers.

vendored.name: libwebp ESP32 decode subset
vendored.local_changes: Decode-only source subset with ESP32 PSRAM, watchdog, scaling, and error-handling adaptations.

vendored.name: Remote Image ESPHome component
vendored.revision: Project-maintained derivative; original import revision is not preserved
vendored.local_changes: Renamed component with JPEG/WebP decoders, reliability fixes, buffer controls, and Espframe display behavior.

external_build_assets.revision: ESPHome gfonts provider family and weight selector

allowed: The versioned Espframe firmware manifest and firmware assets
The ESPHome ESP32-C6 hosted-firmware manifest and assets
Home Assistant and ESPHome API clients configured by the user
forbidden: Hosted fonts, scripts, stylesheets, or tracking pixels required by the device control panel
